body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: DS first live build on devstral@Hex
body.intention: I intend to catch the silent failure modes of routing builder inference to a local box, so the cost-lift doesn't trade for invisible regressions.
body.description:
**What changed:** DS builder inference rerouted from ollama_cloud to a local Ollama on Hex (10.0.0.100), with a new local `ollama` ModelSpec + worker rule, and the first live devstral ToolLoop build was run.
**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) local-preferred routing could send OTHER worker-tier callers (not just DS) to Hex and overload a single 32GB box / evict the pinned model; (2) when Hex is down the fallback-to-cloud must actually fire — a missing `available` check would hard-fail worker dispatch instead of falling back; (3) the `local_ollama`→`ollama` rename could change batch-tier routing (those rules were dead, so behavior changes from never-resolves to resolves); (4) devstral may reach DONE on the trivial create but loop/escalate on any non-trivial ticket — the smoke green does not generalize.
**Signals to watch:** inference Proxy selection logs showing source=`ollama` vs `ollama_cloud` per worker dispatch; Hex `/api/ps` model residency; any worker dispatch hard-failing when Hex unreachable (should skip→cloud); batch-tier dispatches now resolving.
**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-07-14 or when the second (non-trivial) DS build is attempted.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket

[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
